issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete and oversimplified. The effect requires: (1) looking at top 2 cards, (2) revealing up to 1 {The Seven Warlords of the Sea} type card, (3) adding it to hand, (4) placing remaining cards at top or bottom in any order. Current DSL only shows a generic SearchDeck with no filter, depth, or deck rearrangement logic.
Filter must specify {The Seven Warlords of the Sea} type constraint, not "Any". The action is conditional on card type.

Missing action for placing remaining cards back to deck. After selecting up to 1 card for hand, the other card(s) must be placed at top or bottom of deck in any order. This requires a second action or extended SearchDeck with deckPlacement parameter.

filter.value: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
